preConditions.sqlCheck: select count(*) from sys_menu where id = '298416852403535872'

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO sys_menu (name, type, permission, parent_id, sort, path, component, description, status, meta, create_by, create_date, update_by, update_date, deleted, id) VALUES ('FlwTask', 'menu', null, '297165294707716096', 7, '/flowable/task', '/flowable/task/list', null, '1', '{"icon": "carbon:task", "title": "流程任务", "keepAlive": true, "activeIcon": "carbon:task-complete"}', 'admin', '2026-06-11 10:00:00.000', 'admin', '2026-06-11 10:00:00.000', 0, '298416852403535872'); insert into sys_role_menu_rl (role_id, menu_id, id) values (1, '298416852403535872', '298416852403535872');
